notes.Q_interpretation: Per-calendar-day process noise variance. At steady state with n=15 games/day, Kalman gain K ≈ 0.026–0.04.
notes.R_interpretation: Per-game observation noise variance. sqrt(R) ≈ 4.61 runs matches observed game-level std (~4.5 runs).
notes.R_n_obs_var: Observation variance for daily mean of n games = R/n ≈ 21.25/15 ≈ 1.42.
notes.ac2_note: May-20 strict pregame state = 8.856 (vs 8.81 threshold); misses by 0.046 due to May 17-19 high-scoring games (obs=9.87/10.86/9.07). Filter was below 8.81 for 8 consecutive pregame dates (May-12 through May-19). May avg state = 8.82 < run_env_mu_v4 (8.88).
notes.ac1_note: Kalman 14-day rolling std ratio vs trailing-10 = 0.081 (requirement < 0.50). Decisively passes.
notes.season_reset: On gap > 120 days (off-season), state is blended 50/50 with long-run prior to prevent off-season dead-reckoning from biasing the season opener.
